relations.note: Known-safe combinations support, but do not replace, testing every text/background pair.
The gold-on-white restriction enforces the broader contrast requirement.

quotes: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.
WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.

rules.intent: Ensure every text and background combination remains legible at the required WCAG AA level.
rules.rule_text: Test every text/background pair with WebAIM or an equivalent tool. Meet WCAG AA minimums by binding body.contrast.minimum = 4.5:1 and large_text.contrast.minimum = 3:1; the source defines large text as at least 24px or 19px bold.

quotes: Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy.

rules.intent: Provide established color combinations that support accessible contrast.
rules.rule_text: Known-safe text/background combinations are Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, or Graphite on White, Light Blue, or Golden Sand, and White on Brand Blue, Deep Blue, or Dark Navy.

effect.reserved_for: surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis
effect.subject: Gold and Sunshine color usage

quotes: Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.
Avoid: Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast)
golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

rules.intent: Prevent inaccessible gold-on-white text while preserving gold as an emphasis color.
rules.rule_text: Do not use Gold or Sunshine text on White because it fails contrast. Reserve gold colors for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

effect.b: icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback

quotes: Don't rely on color alone to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.
Don't rely on color alone to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

rules.intent: Keep meaning perceivable for users who cannot distinguish color cues.
rules.rule_text: Do not rely on color alone to convey meaning; pair color cues with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.
